title: It Happened in Paris
writer: John Huston, H.F. Maltby, Yves Mirande
actors: John Loder, Nancy Burne, Edward H. Robins
plot: Paul, artistically-inclined son of an American millionaire, moves to Paris where he can find inspiration and study the masters. While there, he finds inspiration of a different sort in the form of the beautiful Jacqueline.
